accounts.name: agent_account
docs: Optional agent account — present only when an agent was assigned. The
caller is responsible for passing it; the program enforces that, when
`task.assigned_agent` is Some, this account exists and matches.

accounts.name: agent_account
docs: Optional: present only when an agent was assigned (to take the penalty).

errors.name: DeadlineTooSoon
errors.msg: Deadline must be at least one hour in the future.

errors.name: AmountBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Reward amount is below the configured minimum.

errors.name: InvalidTaskStatus
errors.msg: Task is not in a state that allows this action.

errors.name: BountyMustNotPreassign
errors.msg: Bounty mode requires no pre-assigned agent at creation.

errors.name: DirectRequiresAssignedAgent
errors.msg: Direct mode requires an assigned agent at creation.

errors.name: NotAssignedAgent
errors.msg: Signer is not the assigned agent for this task.

errors.name: NotPoster
errors.msg: Signer is not the poster for this task.

errors.name: NotDisputeAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not authorized to dispute this task.

errors.name: TaskExpired
errors.msg: Task is past its deadline; cannot perform this action.

errors.name: AlreadyAssigned
errors.msg: Task already has an assigned agent.

errors.name: CurrencyMismatch
errors.msg: Vault currency does not match the task currency.

errors.name: NumericOverflow
errors.msg: Numeric overflow during fee or amount calculation.

errors.name: MissingRecipientAccount
errors.msg: Recipient account is required for this currency path but was not provided.

errors.name: AgentAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Provided agent account does not match the assigned agent on the task.
